-march=native  -pipe -fPIC -Wall -fno-strict-aliasing -rdynamic -Wno-packed-bitfield-compat -std=c++11  -O2 -g   -ggdb2 -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/home/zyzy/zy-OAI CMakeFiles/nr-cuup.dir/executables/nr-cuup.c.o
